row.prescription: Soma (muscle relaxant) 350 mg, OxyContin (opioid) 20 mg, Vicodin (opioid) 10 mg
Soma (muscle relaxant) 350 mg, OxyContin (opioid) 20 mg, Vicodin (opioid) 10 mg
Soma (muscle relaxant) 350 mg, OxyContin (opioid) 40 mg, Vicodin (opioid) 15 mg
Soma (muscle relaxant) 350 mg, OxyContin (opioid) 40 mg, Vicodin (opioid) 15 mg

file2.formTop: AO 110 (Rev. 06/09) Subpoena to Testify Before a Grand Jury
file2.subpoena: SUBPOENA TO TESTIFY BEFORE A GRAND JURY
file2.to:
Dr. Justine Phillips
Pain Management Center, Las Vegas, Nevada
file2.commandLine: YOU ARE COMMANDED to appear in this United States district court at the time, date, and place shown below to testify before the court’s grand jury.
file2.placeText:
US District Court
333 S. Las Vegas Blvd, Grand Jury Room 8272
Las Vegas, NV 89101
file2.bringWith: You must also bring with you the following documents, electronically stored information, or objects
file2.bringWithText: All documents in your possession which evidence VIOLATION OF THE CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE ACT on the part of any former or current employee of the Pain Management Center.
file2.signature: Signature of Clerk or Deputy Clerk
file2.footer: The name, address, e-mail, and telephone number of the United States attorney, or assistant United States attorney, who requests this subpoena, are:
